title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 09 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 09 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 09 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 09/09/2021
DCE iron ore futures again decreased today, main contract has hit the lowest 717.5 during trading period; the spot quotation in the morning hasdecreased by 25-30yuan/mt. Some traders sell along with market changes, they tend to sell actively. Some steel mills keep quite cautious recently but others are willing to buy, mainly considering that the high coal price recently, they would like to buy middle and high Fe iron ore to save costs.
